value:
🏷️ **No official resource pack for Slimefun**
There is no official resource pack for Slimefun. Anything you find online is not made by us and we don't support it. Slimefun does not officially support resource packs as of now.
resourcepack
resourcepack

🏷️ **About this fork**
This is a community fork of Slimefun (Slimefun5). It runs on Minecraft **1.8 through 26.x from a single universal jar** (Java 8+), continuing development after upstream ended at 1.21.8. It adds item translations, an in-game addon installer and an in-game bug reporter, among other things.
https://github.com/Slimefun5/Slimefun5
fork

🏷️ **Slimefun – Addons**
Slimefun is great on its own, but addons take it much further. Browse the addon list here: https://github.com/Slimefun5/Slimefun5/wiki
You can also install addons right in-game from the Slimefun Guide → Addons.
Slimefun's API also lets you build your own addon — see the Developer Guide: https://github.com/Slimefun5/Slimefun5/wiki
Please don't report or discuss addons in the main support channels — use the addon's own issue tracker or contact its developer.

🏷️ **Addon updates**
This fork runs on Minecraft 1.8 through 26.x from one universal jar, and its addons are maintained alongside it. Check the in-game Slimefun Guide → Addons for available updates, or the repositories under https://github.com/Slimefun5 .
If an addon isn't updated for your version, reach out to its developer.

🏷️ **Javadocs**
You can browse our API and — more importantly — read the Developer Guide, which walks you through creating a Slimefun addon from scratch: https://github.com/Slimefun5/Slimefun5/wiki

🏷️ **Developer Guide**
Want to create an addon for Slimefun? Great! Check out the developer guide: https://github.com/Slimefun5/Slimefun5/wiki
Note: we expect at least a basic understanding of Java and your build tool (Maven/Gradle).

🏷️ **Please complete ALL of the following steps (all of them — not just the first!)**
1. Run `/sf versions` and send a screenshot. We need the exact versions you're using — "latest" doesn't help us.
2. Check your console for errors. If there are any, post them via https://pastebin.com/ .
3. Run `/pl` and send a screenshot of the output.
Follow these thoroughly, otherwise we can't help you.
incomplete
incomplete
incomplete

🏷️ **Java version**
Unlike upstream Slimefun, this fork is built to run on **Java 8 and above** — the universal jar works from Java 8 up to the latest release, so you don't need to upgrade Java just for Slimefun.
That said, newer Minecraft versions themselves may require a newer Java (e.g. MC 1.20.5+ needs Java 21). Match your Java to your Minecraft version.
Download Java (Adoptium Temurin): https://adoptium.net/
java
java
java
java

🏷️ **Experiencing lag?**
First, identify the source.
1. Use Spark: run `/spark sampler --thread * --timeout 300`, wait 5 minutes, and send the resulting URL.
2. Profile Slimefun: run `/sf timings` and `/sf versions` and send screenshots of both.
3. See our Server Optimization guide on the wiki: https://github.com/Slimefun5/Slimefun5/wiki

🏷️ **Please be kind, okay?**
Keep in mind we are all volunteers here. We aren't paid and do this in our free time because we want to. Please treat us with respect, show patience, and remember that "please" and "thanks" go a long way.
In other words: we don't owe you anything, so please don't expect us to treat you as kings and queens.
karen

🏷️ **Translating Slimefun**
This fork ships with full translations — and yes, item names are translatable here too! You can help improve them. Translations live in the plugin's `languages/` folder and in the repository: https://github.com/Slimefun5/Slimefun5
If your language is missing or incomplete, open an issue or PR, or ask here and we'll help you start.
translations
translations

🏷️ **Frequently Asked Questions (FAQ)**
Check the FAQ on our wiki: https://github.com/Slimefun5/Slimefun5/wiki

🏷️ **Please speak English!**
Por favor, hable Inglés / Solo inglese, per favore / Solo inglés, gracias / пожалуйста, пишите по-английски / 请使用英语沟通 / 영어 써주세요 / チャットは英語のみ / Bitte sprechen Sie Englisch / Anglais seulement s'il vous plaît / Please speak English. Thank you. https://translate.google.com/

🏷️ **Java Naming Conventions**
Package: all lower case, no keywords, format `tld.domain.project` (or `io.github.yourname` if you don't own a domain). Example: `io.github.yourname.project`
Class names: PascalCase. Example: `SomeExampleClass`
Variables: camelCase. Example: `myBoolean`
Constants: `public static final`, SCREAMING_SNAKE_CASE. Example: `EXAMPLE_CRAFTING_TABLE`

🏷️ **Bot commands**
If you're not helping others, please keep bot commands to the appropriate channel to keep the chat clean. Thank you!
bot-spam

🏷️ **Looking for a server host?**
Note: we don't own or endorse any host listed here — do your own research. These are based on personal experience.
Shared hosting: https://shockbyte.com/ · https://nodecraft.com/ · https://mcprohosting.com/
VPS (more control — secure it yourself): https://vultr.com/ · https://digitalocean.com/ · https://scaleway.com/
Dedicated: https://online.net/ · https://ovh.com/ · https://rackspace.com/

🏷️ **"zip file closed" issue**
This is usually caused by a plugin failing to load while the server still tries to access its resources. Check your startup logs to find what failed to load, and send all related startup logs via https://pastebin.com/ so we can investigate.

🏷️ **Changelog**
See the release changelog here: https://github.com/Slimefun5/Slimefun5/releases

🏷️ **Mobs not spawning?**
You likely have a protection plugin preventing spawning.
Towny: single plot → `/plot toggle mobs`; whole town → `/t toggle mobs`
GriefPrevention: `/claimflag entity-spawn any true`

🏷️ **Wrong server?**
This is the Slimefun community Discord — not your Minecraft server's own Discord. If you're looking for server-specific info we can't help; ask via your server's in-game chat for the correct link.
discord

🏷️ **Hybrid servers**
Slimefun does not support hybrid servers (mods + plugins). Mixing mods or data-packs with plugins can cause unexpected results or crashes. For stability we recommend Paper: https://papermc.io/downloads

🏷️ **Slimefun – versions & download**
This fork runs on Minecraft **1.8 through 26.x from a single universal jar** — one download works across every supported version, no separate builds per Minecraft version.
Download the latest release: https://github.com/Slimefun5/Slimefun5/releases
Development builds are produced automatically from the latest commits.
versions

🏷️ **Machines turning to heads?**
There was an issue with ViaVersion where, with the armor-toggle-fix enabled, machines could lose data when placed. It was resolved in a recent ViaVersion build — update to the latest: https://ci.viaversion.com/job/ViaVersion/lastSuccessfulBuild/

🏷️ **Having problems with mob drops?**
Mob stackers modify drops, and most don't handle custom drops correctly. If you're not getting items like basic circuit boards, consider changing your mob-stacking plugin.
We suggest StackMob, where you can set `use-loot-tables` to `false` so custom drops work. (We're not the developers of any stacker plugin — report bugs to the correct author.)

🏷️ **Aternos**
Aternos hosts the official Slimefun, not this fork. To run this fork on Aternos, upload the jar manually from https://github.com/Slimefun5/Slimefun5/releases (Aternos lets you upload plugins). Manual installs are on you.

🏷️ **Backwards compatibility**
Do you have items older than summer 2019 on your server? If not, you can safely disable `backwards-compatibility` in the config for a small performance improvement.

🏷️ **You want free hosting?**
"You get what you pay for." You don't get quality hosting for free. For a small server with friends, a cheap paid host works well; if you're comfortable with Unix/servers, a VPS gives far better performance and flexibility.
Popular hosts: https://shockbyte.com/ · https://nodecraft.com/ · https://vultr.com/ · https://scaleway.com/
Free hosts heavily limit resources and often won't let you upload the latest Slimefun/addon jars.

🏷️ **Post your server log**
Please send your latest log — it helps us spot errors, version mismatches, etc.
How: restart your server and reproduce the action, then open the `logs` folder, find `latest.log`, paste its contents into https://pastebin.com/ and send us the URL.
log

🏷️ **Cracked server?**
If you're running a cracked (offline-mode) server, we won't provide support. We don't support software piracy — please buy the game.
cracked

🏷️ **Found a bug?**
Please report it! You can use the in-game bug reporter (Slimefun Guide → Settings → Report a Bug), the `/report` command here on Discord, or open an issue at https://github.com/Slimefun5/Slimefun5/issues
If it's an addon bug, report it on that addon's own issue tracker instead.

🏷️ **Are my addons up to date?**
This fork runs on Minecraft 1.8 through 26.x from one universal jar, and its addons are maintained alongside it. Check the in-game Slimefun Guide → Addons for the latest, or the repositories under https://github.com/Slimefun5 .

🏷️ **Bug on Bedrock Edition?**
Bedrock is not supported. The bridge linking it to Java (Geyser) is still very buggy — please don't report Bedrock bugs to us; we can't fix them. Current limitations: https://wiki.geysermc.org/geyser/current-limitations/

🏷️ **We recommend Paper!**
Paper is the recommended server software for Slimefun. It includes many optimizations, and we use its APIs to optimize Slimefun further. If you have lag or just want Slimefun to run smoother, use Paper: https://papermc.io/downloads
Optimization guide: https://github.com/Slimefun5/Slimefun5/wiki

🏷️ **Spark**
Please run a Spark profile — it lets us pinpoint exactly what's causing lag. Download Spark: https://spark.lucko.me/
Run `/spark sampler --thread * --timeout 300`, wait 5 minutes, and send us the resulting link.

🏷️ **Please be patient!**
People are usually busy and can't answer immediately. If a good while has passed with no answer, feel free to politely bump your question once. Abuse of pings may result in action.

🏷️ **Contributing to Slimefun**
There are many ways to contribute:
• Submitting bug reports
• Helping with translations
• Contributing to the wiki
• Fixing bugs
• Adding unit tests
• Adding new content
Read more in our CONTRIBUTING.md on GitHub: https://github.com/Slimefun5/Slimefun5

🏷️ **Our README**
Your question may already be answered here:
• What is Slimefun?
• Where can I download it?
• What Minecraft versions does it support?
• Difference between development and stable builds?
• Where do I report bugs?
• Where do I find translations?
• How can I contribute?
Read the README: https://github.com/Slimefun5/Slimefun5

🏷️ **Seeing player heads as Steve?**
A Spigot change once broke player heads. This fork includes a fix — make sure you're on the latest build: https://github.com/Slimefun5/Slimefun5/releases
steveskin

🏷️ **Windows file-access issue**
Seen an error like `AccessDeniedException: ... stored-blocks/world/BLOCK.sfb.tmp -> ... BLOCK.sfb`?
It's usually one of two things:
• File lock — another process is accessing the file
• File permissions — incorrect permissions on the file
Fix: in the folder (e.g. `data-storage/Slimefun/world`), rename `BLOCK.sfb.tmp` to `BLOCK.sfb`, overwriting the existing file. If you still get an error, fix the file permissions first.

🏷️ **How can I play Slimefun in singleplayer?**
Slimefun is a plugin, not a mod — a server is required. If you don't have one, you can host a local server on your own computer easily (many tutorials exist online) and still enjoy it solo.

🏷️ **Message segmenting**
Please don't segment your messages. Don't press Enter multiple times for something that can easily be written as a single message.

🏷️ **Future & new Minecraft versions**
Upstream Slimefun ended development at 1.21.8. This fork continues where it left off: it supports Minecraft **1.8 all the way through 26.x** from a single universal jar — including the versions upstream never reached — and new versions are added as they release.
Download: https://github.com/Slimefun5/Slimefun5/releases
future
future
future
future

🏷️ **Backpack info**
Backpack data is stored in the player's Slimefun data file at `data-storage/Slimefun/Players/<player-uuid>.dat`.
To recover a lost backpack, use `/sf backpack <player-name> <backpack-id>`. IDs start at 0. The restored backpack is a recovery tool, not a replacement — the ID is tied to the first player who opened it.

🏷️ **Please just ask your question**
Don't ask if you can ask, or ask if anyone can help — just say what you're having trouble with. It saves everyone time.

🏷️ **Please define "it doesn't work"**
"It doesn't work" tells us nothing about the actual problem. Tell us:
• What happens?
• What doesn't happen?
• What did you expect to happen?
• Did you get an error message?
• …and more
Provide as much information as possible — without it, we can't help.
